name: fidget
description: Pre-curated, quality contexts for Claude Code. Go to fidget, get the right context at the right time.

plugins.name: agent-harness
plugins.description: Cited reference for building agent harnesses: the agentic loop, tool design, context/memory, permissions/sandboxing, subagents, resilience, observability, and evals.

plugins.name: context-skill-builder
plugins.description: Run deep research on a topic and turn its verified findings into a cited, LLM-navigable context-skill: a pre-joined manifest, anchored guide, provenance chain, and a validator. Ships the build pipeline, a born-green repo skeleton, and a deep-research report → raw_outputs mapper.
